full_text:
Zhang Yang (Zhishu) 張楊 (稚叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Yang (張楊), styledZhishu (稚叔), was born in Yunzhong. A good and generous man, attempted to aid Emperor Xian but wasn’t trusted by other generals. Zhang Yang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Yuan Shao, and Dong Zhuo. Zhang Yang lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
